name: Glacier Aqua Madoor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>河</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のアクア・マドール
desc: At the start of the Damage Step, if your Normal Monster battles an opponent's monster: You can reveal this card in your hand; discard 1 card, and if you do, your monster cannot be destroyed by that battle. At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster: You can reveal 1 Normal Monster in your hand; discard 1 card, and if you do, destroy that opponent's monster.
mnst_eff: At the start of the Damage Step, if your Normal Monster battles an opponent's monster: You can reveal this card in your hand; discard 1 card, and if you do, your monster cannot be destroyed by that battle. At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster: You can reveal 1 Normal Monster in your hand; discard 1 card, and if you do, destroy that opponent's monster.
eff: At the start of the Damage Step, if your Normal Monster battles an opponent's monster: You can reveal this card in your hand; discard 1 card, and if you do, your monster cannot be destroyed by that battle. At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster: You can reveal 1 Normal Monster in your hand; discard 1 card, and if you do, destroy that opponent's monster.

action: Reveals itself in the hand for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster type
